title: Engines
text: Home * Engines Marcel Duchamp , Portrait of Chess Players, 1911 [1] Several lists of computer chess programs or Chess engines , which is the chess playing part of the chess program, relying on proprietary or standard protocols communicating with an external graphical user interfaces .
